prompts: A detective discovers the victim was actually their ___.
The safe was finally cracked open, but inside was only a single ___.
The ransom note demanded one million dollars and a ___.
They said the basement was empty, but I hear ___ down there.
I hired a private investigator to follow my spouse, but they found ___ instead.
The police arrived at the crime scene, only to find a ___.
Every time I sneeze, I travel ___ minutes into the future.
My robot butler started acting weird when it saw the ___.
NASA just released a photo of Mars, and right in the center is a ___.
It turns out the moon isn't made of rock, it's actually a giant ___.
My new smartwatch doesn't tell time, it tells me ___.
The secret ingredient in the famous soup was ___ all along.
Never trust a person who carries a ___ in their pocket.
I accidentally pressed the red button, and suddenly ___.
safetyPrompts: The lights flickered, and when they came back on, the front door had vanished.
The stray cat jumped onto the table and spoke to me.
I looked into the mirror, but my reflection was staring at the ceiling.
details: a guy in a full mascot suit
a grandfather clock that ticks backward
tooltips: Pro-tip: Kill off a main character.
Did you know? The longest novel ever written is over 13,000 pages.
